why_1: Air preheater fouling — high flue gas exit temp
why_2: Ash deposits on APH tubes are excessive
why_3: High sulphur coal causing sticky ash
why_4: Coal supplier changed blend without notification
why_5_root_cause: No coal quality monitoring protocol at receiving end
corrective_action: Install coal quality testing at unloading + reject non-spec batches
preventive_action: Implement incoming coal quality SOP with auto-reject criteria

why_1: Erosion at soot blower zone — wall below minimum
why_2: Soot blower jet impinging directly on tube bank
why_3: Soot blower alignment drifted after last maintenance
why_4: No alignment verification step in maintenance SOP
why_5_root_cause: SOP gap — alignment check not included in soot blower PM checklist
corrective_action: Add alignment verification to SOP-BLR-02. Install erosion shields.
preventive_action: Update all soot blower maintenance SOPs across fleet

problem_statement: ID fan vibration exceeding trip limit
why_4: OEM recommendation not followed — generic schedule applied
why_5_root_cause: Maintenance planning used generic intervals instead of OEM-specific
corrective_action: Revise PM schedule per OEM specs. Implement condition-based monitoring.
preventive_action: Standardize PM intervals per OEM manuals for all rotating equipment

problem_statement: Hot spots on furnace casing — refractory spalling
why_1: Refractory lining has spalled in 3 zones
why_3: Plant operates in cyclic mode — 2 shutdowns per week
why_4: Previous refractory repair used incorrect heat-up rate
why_5_root_cause: Contractor did not follow controlled heat-up procedure during last repair
corrective_action: Enforce controlled heat-up SOP for all refractory repairs. Use thermal-cycle-resistant grade.
preventive_action: Qualify refractory contractors. Mandate heat-up curve compliance.

problem_statement: Bottom ash cooler screw conveyor seized
why_1: Clinker jammed between screw flights and trough
why_2: Clinker formed due to high ash fusion temperature
why_3: Coal ash fusion temp 1180°C vs design 1250°C limit
why_4: Coal blend changed for cost optimization without checking AFT
why_5_root_cause: No linkage between coal procurement and boiler design fuel spec
corrective_action: Mandate AFT check for all coal procurement batches. Set min AFT limit in PO.
preventive_action: Create fuel specification compliance workflow linking procurement to engineering
